translation: در درجه اول / اول از همه
explanation: عبارتی برای شروع صحبت یا اولویت‌بندی نکات که در رایتینگ و اسپیکینگ آیلتس بسیار کاربردی است.

text: welcome to our activity summer camp. I hope you enjoy all the

explanation: عبارت on offer به معنای موجود بودن یا ارائه شدن خدمات یا کالاهاست.

text: . We start our tour at the outdoor theatre here, where we hold many of our evening activities. From here you can see our various watersport activities. Directly in front of the campsite, on the edge of the lake, we have the kayaking centre. And then in front of the beach, we have an area

translation: رزرو شده برای / اختصاص یافته به
explanation: در اینجا به معنای فضایی است که منحصراً برای یک فعالیت خاص (غواصی) در نظر گرفته شده است.

text:
diving. Swimming isn't permitted here.
If you like

explanation: ورزش‌هایی مثل تنیس، بدمینتون و پینگ‌پنگ که با راکت انجام می‌شوند.

text:
, just behind the beach you can practise badminton in the large building. That's quite popular in the evenings. We also have some outdoor tennis courts. We used to have basketball in the building too, but now you can play it on the court behind the building. And if these activities make you hungry, the path from there takes you straight to the café and dining hall.
However, we'll continue our walk along the lake shore and I'd like to

translation: توجه شما را به ... جلب کردن
explanation: یک عبارت رسمی و پرکاربرد برای معطوف کردن تمرکز مخاطب به یک موضوع یا مکان خاص.

text: two other areas. One is this part of the lake, which is perfect for swimming, but, for

explanation: اصطلاحی متداول در متون رسمی و آموزشی برای توضیح محدودیت‌ها.

text: , only when an instructor is present. Unfortunately we can't offer sailing as an option here this year. And I also want to

explanation: فعل عبارتی (Phrasal Verb) به معنای جلب توجه کسی به یک حقیقت یا اطلاعات.

text:
, just across the lake, a track for cycling. Some people in the past have also gone running on the track, but there were a few accidents because there isn't enough space for runners and cyclists, so now running isn't allowed.
So now let's take this path here, towards the tennis courts. On our left, you can see there's a football field. Gary's our coach and he'll be organising tournaments during the week. He'll arrive tomorrow, because he's

explanation: مترادف رایج و کاربردی برای participate in.

text:
a rugby game today.
And now if we walk up to the right of the tennis courts, we can see the archery field,

translation: محصور شده توسط / احاطه شده با
explanation: عبارتی برای توصیف ویژگی‌های جغرافیایی یا مکانی یک محل.

text: trees. And in the building just to the right of this, you can hire equipment for the archery and buy snacks and drinks. It also has some table tennis tables, so you can go there and have a game if the

translation: هوا بد شود / شرایط جوی نامساعد شود
explanation: استفاده از فعل turn برای بیان تغییر ناگهانی در وضعیت آب و هوا.
